risk.description: Moderate sustainability concerns. Significant improvement potential.

findings.title: High EC2 Resource Utilization
findings.description: EC2 instances are operating at 87% utilization, indicating either overprovisioning or inefficient instance sizing.

findings.title: Cold Storage Archive Opportunity
findings.description: 72% of storage is in active tiers. Significant data may be suitable for cheaper archive storage.

findings.title: Accelerating Carbon Emissions
findings.description: Carbon emissions are increasing by 12% month-over-month, exceeding sustainable growth benchmarks.

recommendations.title: Downsize Idle EC2 Instances
recommendations.description: Analysis shows multiple EC2 instances operating below optimal utilization. Downsize or consolidate instances to match actual workload requirements.

recommendations.title: Archive Cold Storage Data
recommendations.description: Move data not accessed in 90+ days to S3 Glacier or equivalent archive tier. Significantly reduces storage costs and carbon footprint.

recommendations.title: Migrate to Lower Carbon Region
recommendations.description: Move workloads to cloud regions powered by renewable energy. Significant carbon footprint reduction without operational changes.

recommendations.title: Optimize Database Connections & Queries
recommendations.description: Implement connection pooling, query optimization, and indexing strategies to reduce database resource consumption.

executiveSummary.currentStatus: Adequate sustainability practices with significant improvement potential
executiveSummary.expectedOutcome: Implementing all recommendations can improve sustainability score from C to A and reduce carbon emissions by 15.0%.
